languages.text: "Лорд-капитан! Вы на самом деле пришли. Снова, как на мою операцию. Вы здесь, чтобы избавить меня от боли". {n}Лицо человека мелко подрагивает, будто в бесконечном тике, но он все равно выдавливает из себя улыбку. Место соединения импланта с головой покраснело и сочится сукровицей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан! Вы на самом деле пришли. Снова, как на мою операцию. Вы здесь, чтобы избавить меня от боли". {n}Лицо человека мелко подрагивает, будто в бесконечном тике, но он все равно выдавливает из себя улыбку. Место соединения импланта с головой покраснело и сочится сукровицей.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain! You actually came. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан! Вы на самом деле пришли. Снова, как на мою операцию. Вы здесь, чтобы избавить меня от боли". {n}Лицо человека мелко подрагивает, будто в бесконечном тике, но он все равно выдавливает из себя улыбку. Место соединения импланта с головой покраснело и сочится сукровицей.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! You really did come. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in an unending tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing blood.{/n}

"Lord Captain! You really did come. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in an unending tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing blood.{/n}

"Lord Captain! You actually came. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}

"Lord Captain! You actually came. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain! Ihr seid tatsächlich gekommen. Wie zu meiner Operation. Ihr seid hier, um meinen Schmerz zu lindern." {n}Das Gesicht des Mannes zuckt leicht, aber er zwingt sich trotzdem zu einem Lächeln. Die Stelle, an der das Implantat mit seinem Kopf verbunden ist, hat sich rot gefärbt und blutet.{/n}

You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain! Ihr seid tatsächlich gekommen. Wie zu meiner Operation. Ihr seid hier, um meinen Schmerz zu lindern." {n}Das Gesicht des Mannes zuckt leicht, aber er zwingt sich trotzdem zu einem Lächeln. Die Stelle, an der das Implantat mit seinem Kopf verbunden ist, hat sich rot gefärbt und blutet.{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous êtes {mf|venu|venue}. Comme pour mon opération. Vous êtes là pour soulager ma douleur. » {n}Le visage de l'homme se contracte légèrement, comme sous l'effet d'un tic persistant, mais il se force néanmoins à sourire. La zone où l'implant est fixé à son crâne est fortement inflammée et suinte du sang.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! You actually came. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine} ! Vous êtes {mf|venu|venue}. Comme pour mon opération. Vous êtes là pour soulager ma douleur. » {n}Le visage de l'homme se contracte légèrement, comme sous l'effet d'un tic persistant, mais il se force néanmoins à sourire. La zone où l'implant est fixé à son crâne est fortement inflammée et suinte du sang.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人！您真来了，就像我做手术时那样。您来帮我解除痛苦了。”{n}男人的脸轻微抽动着，仿佛患有顽固的抽搐症一般，但他还是勉强挤出一丝微笑。植入物与头部的接缝处已经泛红，正往外渗血。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! You actually came. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人！您真来了，就像我做手术时那样。您来帮我解除痛苦了。”{n}男人的脸轻微抽动着，仿佛患有顽固的抽搐症一般，但他还是勉强挤出一丝微笑。植入物与头部的接缝处已经泛红，正往外渗血。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! Ha venido... Igual que vino a mi cirugía Viene a aliviar mi dolor». {n}La cara del hombre se retuerce, como si sufriera un tic constante, pero se obliga a sonreír pese a todo. La zona donde el implante se conecta a su cabeza está roja y llena de sangre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! You actually came. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! Ha venido... Igual que vino a mi cirugía Viene a aliviar mi dolor». {n}La cara del hombre se retuerce, como si sufriera un tic constante, pero se obliga a sonreír pese a todo. La zona donde el implante se conecta a su cabeza está roja y llena de sangre.{/n}

languages.text: 「キャプテン閣下！本当に来てくれたんだね。私の手術のときと同じように。私の痛みを和らげるために来てくださったのですね"{n}その男の顔は、まるで終わりの見えないチックのようにわずかに痙攣しているが、それでも無理に笑みを作っている。インプラントが頭部につながっている部分が赤くなり、血がにじんでいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! You really did come. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in an unending tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and is oozing blood.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan! Gerçekten geldiniz. Tıpkı ameliyatımda olduğu gibi. Acımı dindirmek için buradasınız." {n}Adamın yüzü hafifçe, sanki kalıcı bir tik varmış gibi seğiriyor ama kendini yine de gülümsemeye zorluyor. İmplantın kafasına bağlandığı bölge kızarmış ve kan sızdırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain! You actually came. Just like you did for my surgery. You are here to relieve my pain." {n}The man's face twitches slightly, as if in a persistent tic, but he forces a smile nonetheless. The area where the implant connects to his head has turned red and oozes blood.{/n}
